title: Mother Knows Best, Even in College
summary_en: A Saint Louis University first-year seminar offers the mother lode of real-world lessons and future-facing skills.
title_cn: 《圣路易斯大学开设特色新生研讨课 印证母亲经验在大学阶段仍具指导价值》

title: SLU Political Science Major Appointed to New Aspen Institute Advisory Group
summary_en: Saint Louis University political science major Faith Townsell has been appointed to the Aspen Institute's Rising Generations Strategy Group, a national advisory body within the Institute's Education & Society Program. Rising Generations Strategy Group is a new initiative designed to shape a bold, shared vision for the future of American education.
title_cn: 圣路易斯大学政治学专业学生获任阿斯彭研究所新设咨询组成员
